title: See Ideas Come Alive
aha_moment: Any concept you can describe in words, Curiso can transform into a beautiful, animated visual explanation — instantly.

scenes.narration: What if every idea you ever struggled to understand... every concept that felt just out of reach... could simply come alive, right before your eyes?
scenes.animation_description: Black screen (self.camera.background_color = '#000000'). Pause for 1 second with self.wait(1). Create a Text object with the hook question split across two lines: line1 = Text('What if every idea you ever struggled to understand...', font='Avenir', font_size=36, color='#FFFF00') and line2 = Text('could simply come alive before your eyes?', font='Avenir', font_size=36, color='#FFFF00'). Group them in a VGroup(line1, line2).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.5).move_to(ORIGIN). Use Write(line1, run_time=3, rate_func=smooth) then self.wait(0.5), then Write(line2, run_time=2.5, rate_func=smooth). Hold with self.wait(2.5) so the question sinks in. Then FadeOut(line1, line2, run_time=1). self.wait(0.5).

scenes.narration: Type a sentence. Just a simple idea — anything you want to understand. And watch as artificial intelligence transforms your words into a stunning visual explanation. Equations that write themselves. Graphs that draw in real time. Concepts that finally click.
scenes.animation_description: Black screen. Create a prompt_label = Text('Your prompt:', font='Avenir', font_size=22, color='#888888').to_edge(UP, buff=0.8).to_edge(LEFT, buff=1.5). FadeIn(prompt_label, run_time=0.5). Then create prompt_text = Text('"Explain how derivatives work"', font='Avenir', font_size=30, color='#FFFFFF').next_to(prompt_label, DOWN, buff=0.5, aligned_edge=LEFT). Animate the prompt with Write(prompt_text, run_time=2.5) to simulate typewriter effect. self.wait(1). Then play FadeOut(prompt_label, run_time=0.5) simultaneously with prompt_text.animate.move_to(UP * 2.5).scale(0.7) over run_time=1. self.wait(0.5). Now show the 'output': Create derivative_eq = MathTex(r'\frac{d}{dx}[x^2] = 2x', font_size=48, color='#58C4DD').move_to(ORIGIN). Play ReplacementTransform(prompt_text, derivative_eq, run_time=2, rate_func=smooth). self.wait(0.8). Create axes = Axes(x_range=[-3, 3, 1], y_range=[-1, 9, 2], x_length=5, y_length=3, axis_config={'color': '#888888', 'stroke_width': 2}).shift(DOWN * 0.8). parabola = axes.plot(lambda x: x**2, x_range=[-2.8, 2.8], color='#83C167', stroke_width=3). tangent = axes.plot(lambda x: 2*x - 1, x_range=[-0.5, 2.5], color='#FC6255', stroke_width=2). Play derivative_eq.animate.shift(UP * 1.8).scale(0.8) over run_time=0.8. Play Create(axes, run_time=1), then Create(parabola, run_time=1.5, rate_func=smooth), then Create(tangent, run_time=1, rate_func=smooth). self.wait(1.5). FadeOut(*self.mobjects, run_time=0.8).

scenes.narration: Mathematics that unfolds step by step. Computer science, visualized in ways you've never seen before. Physics in motion — forces, fields, and flows. Any subject you can imagine, any concept you want to master — brought to life in seconds.
scenes.animation_description: Black screen. SEGMENT 1 — Math: Create integral = MathTex(r'\int_0^1 x^2 \, dx = \frac{1}{3}', font_size=48, color='#58C4DD').move_to(ORIGIN). label_math = Text('Mathematics', font='Avenir', font_size=22, color='#FFFF00').to_edge(DOWN, buff=0.8). Play Write(integral, run_time=1.5) and FadeIn(label_math, run_time=0.5). self.wait(1.5). FadeOut(integral, label_math, run_time=0.6). SEGMENT 2 — CS: Create 4 Circle nodes (radius=0.3, color='#58C4DD', fill_opacity=0.3) arranged in a diamond pattern centered at ORIGIN: n1 at UP*1.2, n2 at LEFT*1.5, n3 at RIGHT*1.5, n4 at DOWN*1.2. Create Line arrows between them (n1->n2, n1->n3, n2->n4, n3->n4) with color='#888888', stroke_width=2. Add small Text labels '1','0','1','0' (font='Avenir', font_size=18, color='#FFFFFF') inside each node. label_cs = Text('Computer Science', font='Avenir', font_size=22, color='#FFFF00').to_edge(DOWN, buff=0.8). FadeIn all nodes and arrows simultaneously over run_time=1. FadeIn(label_cs, run_time=0.5). self.wait(1.5). FadeOut all, run_time=0.6. SEGMENT 3 — Physics: Create an Arrow(start=LEFT*2, end=RIGHT*2, color='#FC6255', stroke_width=4, buff=0) for force vector. Create Arrow(start=LEFT*2, end=LEFT*2 + UP*1.5, color='#83C167', stroke_width=3, buff=0) for velocity. Create a small Circle(radius=0.15, color='#FFFFFF', fill_opacity=1).move_to(LEFT*2) as the particle. label_phys = Text('Physics', font='Avenir', font_size=22, color='#FFFF00').to_edge(DOWN, buff=0.8). Play GrowArrow for force arrow run_time=0.8, GrowArrow for velocity arrow run_time=0.8, FadeIn(particle), FadeIn(label_phys). self.wait(1.5). FadeOut all, run_time=0.6. FINAL BEAT: anything_text = Text('Any subject. Any concept.', font='Avenir', font_size=36, color='#FFFF00').move_to(ORIGIN). FadeIn(anything_text, run_time=0.8). self.wait(1.2). FadeOut(anything_text, run_time=0.6). self.wait(0.3).

scenes.narration: This is Curiso. Understanding was never meant to be this beautiful. Type a topic. Watch it come alive.
scenes.animation_description: Black screen. self.wait(1) for dramatic pause. Create logo_text = Text('Curiso', font='Avenir', font_size=60, color='#FFFFFF', weight=BOLD).move_to(UP * 0.5). Play FadeIn(logo_text, run_time=2, rate_func=smooth). self.wait(1). Create tagline = Text('Type a topic. Watch it come alive.', font='Avenir', font_size=28, color='#58C4DD').next_to(logo_text, DOWN, buff=0.7). Play FadeIn(tagline, shift=UP * 0.3, run_time=1.5, rate_func=smooth). self.wait(0.5). Create a subtle underline: underline = Line(start=tagline.get_left() + DOWN*0.2, end=tagline.get_right() + DOWN*0.2, color='#58C4DD', stroke_width=1, stroke_opacity=0.5). Play Create(underline, run_time=0.8). self.wait(2.5). FadeOut(*self.mobjects, run_time=1.5).
